_comment: Deterministic demo headlines (real stories, early July 2026) for offline/demo runs. Single source of truth: swap _read_news in app/tools/ticker_card.py for a live provider without touching the NewsItem contract or callers.

NVDA.title: Nvidia edges lower as investors take profits after a record first half for chips
Nvidia launches revenue-sharing program giving AI startups compute for a cut of future revenue
Valar Atomics partners with Nvidia on a small Utah data-center

TSLA.title: Tesla falls about 7.5% despite record quarterly deliveries
Truist keeps Tesla at Hold ahead of the delivery print
Michael Burry discloses bets against Tesla and chip stocks

AAPL.title: Apple breaks out, up about 4.8% on the week amid new-iPhone reports
Apple plans at least five new iPhone models, report says
Apple Q3 earnings due July 30; iPhone demand in focus

_market.title: Tech-led pullback drags the S&P 500 and Nasdaq lower
Micron hits an all-time high near $1,051 after blockbuster earnings
Alphabet to replace Verizon in the Dow
Earnings season kicks off July 14 with the banks; about 22% S&P EPS growth expected
Nvidia edges lower as investors take profits after a record first half for chips
Apple breaks out on new-iPhone reports; five models said to be planned
